title: Bangalore traffic will teach you patience: Karnataka High Court refuses to quash road rage case against techie
description: The Karnataka High Court on Monday declined to entertain a plea to quash an attempt to murder case arising out of an alleged road rage incident involving a Bengaluru-based software engineer.Justice M Nagaprasanna observed that road rage cannot be lightly excused. "If you have no patience, then there is nothing to do. Bangalore traffic will teach you patience. But you should have it. No road rages will be pardoned," held the Court.Justice M NagaprasannaThe case stemmed from an incident reported o
